use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons that reveal alternative text on hover
Interactive buttons with sliding animation effects for engagement
Navigation CTAs that use hover states to communicate interactivity
Marketing pages requiring eye-catching animated button interactions
Dark-themed interfaces needing gradient-filled animated buttons
ai_summary: An animated button component featuring a dual-layer text reveal effect on hover. The button displays 'Hover me' initially, then slides the text up while a new layer slides in from below with a scaled background reveal effect. Uses dark gradient styling with purple/blue tones and rounded borders. Ideal for SaaS and dev-tool interfaces seeking interactive, polished button interactions.
